breakdown: PR refactors the rewards normalization to use a centralized robust numeric converter (_DNC) with a new _get_raw() helper that cascades through multiple field aliases before falling back to zero. Adds a comprehensive E2E test suite validating both unit tests for edge cases (messy strings, NaN, fallbacks) and live LLM hallucination provocation. Minor gaps: _get_raw uses Any return type, and no explicit exception handling around the converter calls.
key_changes: Replace individual coerce_int() calls with centralized _DNC.convert_value() using _get_raw() helper for cascading field lookup
Add _get_raw() helper that handles fallbacks: tries multiple keys, skips empty strings, treats 0/0.0/NaN/inf as invalid, returns first finite non-zero value
Maintain backward compatibility by checking legacy keys (xp_gained, gold_pieces) as fallbacks
Add test_rewards_box_robustness.py E2E test with internal unit tests + live hallucination provocation scenario
Comment explains WHY: LLM-generated payloads use non-standard boolean/numeric representations requiring robust parsing
